articles.author: Andras Gergely, Peter Laca
articles.title: Forint Surges as Orban’s Loss Starts New Era for Hungary-EU Ties - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Hungary’s forint surged to a four-year high after Prime Minister Viktor Orban conceded defeat in Sunday’s election, with the opposition’s victory expected to help unlock billions of euros in European Union funding.
